messages.message: Which Pilates Reformer models do you offer?

We offer wooden, aluminum, foldable Reformers, as well as Reformer with Tower options.

The right model depends on your usage, quantity, and market. You can share these details with us, and we’ll guide you accordingly.
我们提供木质、铝制、可折叠的 Reformer，以及带塔式选项的 Reformer。

合适的型号取决于您的使用情况、数量和市场。您可以与我们分享这些详细信息，我们将相应地为您提供指导。

Equipment
8 Reformers
2 Cadillac Towers
2 Wunda Chairs
Mats, props, and small apparatus
Sound system and digital booking kiosk

Hi, thanks for sharing the equipment list — I’ve reviewed it together with your studio plan.

Based on what you outlined, this setup is very well suited for a boutique studio with group Reformer classes as the core offering, supported by private sessions.
嗨，感谢您分享设备清单——我已经结合您的工作室计划一起审阅了。

根据你概述的内容，这个配置非常适合精品工作室，以团体 Reformer 课程为核心，辅以私人课程。

To move forward in the most efficient way, I’d just like to confirm two quick things:
 1. For the Reformers, do you have a material preference — wooden or aluminum?
 2. Would you prefer that I recommend a few suitable models for your setup, or would you like me to share the full catalog for you to review first?
为了以最高效的方式继续进行，我想确认两件小事：
1. 对于改革者，你们在材料上有偏好吗——木制还是铝制？
2. 您希望我为您推荐几个适合您配置的型号，还是希望我先分享完整目录供您先查看？
Once I have this, I can take it from there and keep things clear and simple for you.
Hello. My friend and thank you for this.

Wooden material 
木材材质
⁠We would prefer you recommend a few different suitable options
我们更希望你能推荐几个不同的合适选项

Perfect, thank you for confirming.

I’ll share our full wooden Reformer catalog with you now, including the different wooden models commonly used for group-based boutique studios.

You can review them at your own pace, and once any models stand out, we can go through the details together and narrow things down.
Ok awesome reviewing them now
What’s the price range?

Hi, good question.

For our wooden Reformers, the typical price range is approximately USD 300-1300 per unit, depending on the specific model and configuration.

Once you let me know which models from the catalog stand out to you, I can share the exact pricing for those and help you narrow things down.
Ok thank you for this.

Perfect, thank you for confirming.

Just to make sure I have this right, you’re selecting:
 • OR001 (Oak Reformer)
 • PR001 (Oak Reformer with Tower)
 • PC001 (Oak Cadillac)

Before I prepare the detailed pricing, could you please confirm the quantity for each model?
Once I have that, I’ll put the numbers together for you.
太好了，谢谢确认。

为了确保我理解正确，您选择的是：
• OR001（橡木改造器）
• PR001（带塔的橡木改造器）
• PC001 (橡木凯迪拉克)

在准备详细价格之前，您能确认每个型号的数量吗？
一旦我有了这些信息，我就会为您汇总数字。

Okay awesome 1.) 4 oak reformer
 2.) 4 oak reformer with tower 
 3.) 2 Oak Cadillac
好的，太棒了 1.) 4 橡木改革者
2.) 4 橡木改革者带塔
3.) 2 橡木凯迪拉克

Perfect, thank you — I’ve got it.

So the configuration is:
 • 4 × OR001 (Oak Reformer)
 • 4 × PR001 (Oak Reformer with Tower)
 • 2 × PC001 (Oak Cadillac)

I’ll prepare the detailed pricing based on this setup.
Before I finalize it, could you please confirm the delivery city and ZIP code, so I can make sure everything is calculated accurately?

Once I have that, I’ll send everything over.

Ok awesome
好的，太棒了
Charlotte,NC 28202

Perfect, thank you — I have everything I need now.

I’m preparing the detailed pricing for this setup, including delivery to Charlotte, NC 28202.
I’ll send the full breakdown over shortly.
太好了，谢谢——我现在需要的东西都有了。

我正在准备这套设备的详细报价，包括运送到北卡罗来纳州夏洛特，邮编 28202。
我很快会发送完整的分解清单。

Hi ——,

Thanks for confirming the delivery details.

Based on your final configuration and using our 10+ units pricing tier, here is the full cost breakdown:

Equipment pricing (USD):

根据您的最终配置，并使用我们 10+单位的定价层级，以下是完整成本明细：

设备价格（美元）：
4 × OR001 (Oak Reformer) — $379 / unit → $1,516
4 × OR001 (橡木改革者) — 每台 379 美元 → 总计 1,516 美元
4 × PR001 (Oak Reformer with Tower) — $524 / unit → $2,096
2 × PC001 (Oak Cadillac) — $433 / unit → $866

Total equipment value: $4,478

Shipping & delivery (DDP): $2,533
This is a DDP shipment, including ocean freight, customs clearance, import duties/taxes, and final truck delivery to your address in Charlotte, NC 28202.

Estimated transit time:
Approximately 38–42 calendar days after vessel departure.

设备总价值：4,478 美元

运输与交付（DDP）：$2,533

这是一个 DDP 运输，包括海运费、清关费、进口关税/税费，以及最终卡车送货到您在北卡罗来纳州夏洛特，邮编 28202 的地址。

预计运输时间：

船离港后大约 38-42 个日历日。
Once you’re ready, I can prepare the formal PI and confirm the production schedule.
Ok awesome will circle back with feedback.

Sounds good — thank you.

Take your time, and feel free to come back with any questions or adjustments.
I’ll be here and happy to support whenever you’re ready.

Ok sounds great
好的，听起来很棒

Hi ——, just checking in to see if any questions came up on your side.
Happy to adjust or clarify anything if helpful.

Hi,

Just wanted to reconnect.

Based on similar studio projects, once pricing and logistics are aligned like this, the next step usually comes down to timing.

Are you targeting a specific opening window, or still mapping out the internal schedule?

That will help me reserve the right production slot for you.

Hey there we are still mapping out the internal schedule and will circle back.
嘿，我们还在制定内部日程，稍后会再联系你。

Sounds good — that makes sense.

Whenever your timeline becomes clearer, just let me know and I’ll align production accordingly.

In the meantime, everything on our side remains ready.
Ok awesome

Hi ——,

Just wanted to reconnect briefly.

Since we’re already aligned on pricing and delivery, I just want to make sure we time production correctly once your internal schedule is finalized.

Even a rough target month helps me plan ahead on my side.

No rush at all — just keeping things aligned.

Hi —,

I was reviewing a few recent studio setups we helped with, and it reminded me of your project in Charlotte.

Many studios with a similar setup usually start with a configuration close to what you selected (Reformers + Tower + Cadillac), and the 10-unit mix you outlined is actually a very balanced starting layout.

If it’s helpful while you’re mapping out the schedule, I can also share a quick reference of how other studios arrange their equipment and space.

No rush at all — just thought it might be useful while things are coming together on your side
嗨——，

我最近在回顾几个我们协助过的近期工作室设置，这让我想起了你在夏洛特的项目。

许多具有类似设置的工作室通常从与你选择的配置（Reformers + Tower + Cadillac）相近的方案开始，而你概述的 10 单元混合配置实际上是一个非常均衡的起始布局。

如果你在规划日程时需要帮助，我还可以分享一份其他工作室如何安排设备和空间的快速参考。

完全不用着急——只是觉得在你们这边事情逐渐成形的时候可能会有些用处

Ok awesome thank you
好的太棒了谢谢
Boutique studio layout

Hi —

As promised, I put together a few simple layout examples based on your equipment mix (4 Reformers, 4 Reformer with Tower, and 2 Cadillacs).

These are typical ways many boutique Pilates studios organize a 10-piece setup to keep the flow smooth between group classes and private sessions.

Usually the Reformers are placed in the main training area, while the Cadillacs are positioned slightly toward the back or a quieter zone for private training or rehab work.

Group class layout
 群组课程布局

Private training layout
 私人培训布局
If you already have an approximate studio size or floor plan, I’d be happy to suggest a layout that fits your space even better.

Ok got it
好的，明白了

Hi,

Great.

Out of curiosity, do you already know roughly how big the studio space will be?

Even an approximate size (sq ft or sqm) would help make sure the layout and spacing work comfortably for the 10-piece setup.
你好，

很好。

出于好奇，你知道工作室空间大概有多大吗？

即使是一个大致的尺寸（平方英尺或平方米）也能帮助确保布局和间距适合 10 件设备的设置。
It will be under 1,500 square feet

Great — that size should work very well for the setup you mentioned.

For a studio under 1,500 sq ft, the combination of 4 reformers, 4 towers and 2 cadillacs is actually a very balanced setup. It allows enough space for comfortable movement while still keeping the room feeling open.

Many boutique Pilates studios in the US run a similar layout.
太好了——这个尺寸应该非常适合你提到的布局。

对于面积小于 1,500 平方英尺的工作室，4 台改革器、4 座塔和 2 辆凯迪拉克的组合实际上是一个非常均衡的布局。它提供了足够的空间进行舒适的活动，同时仍然保持房间的开放感。

美国许多精品普拉提工作室都采用类似的布局。

Since you already have a general idea of the studio size, I was wondering whether the timeline on your side is becoming any clearer — especially for when the space might be ready for equipment.

Even a rough target timing is helpful, so I can make sure production and shipping stay aligned once you’re ready.

No rush at all — just keeping everything coordinated for your project.
既然您已经对工作室的规模有了一个大致的了解，我想知道您那边的时间表是否变得更加清晰——特别是空间何时可以准备好安装设备。

即使是一个粗略的目标时间也很 helpful，这样我就能确保一旦您准备就绪，生产和运输能够保持一致。

完全没有紧迫感——只是确保一切协调一致，以便您的项目顺利进行。

Hi —,

I just wanted to check in briefly.
We will start with the new site this week and we will update you guys on what we need for that space

That sounds great — exciting stage. Once you’ve had a chance to go through the new site, feel free to share any rough layout, dimensions, or even just a quick sketch if helpful. I can help you fine-tune the equipment placement early on, so everything fits naturally into the space without needing adjustments later.
Ok sounds great

last_my_message: That sounds great — exciting stage. Once you’ve had a chance to go through the new site, feel free to share any rough layout, dimensions, or even just a quick sketch if helpful. I can help you fine-tune the equipment placement early on, so everything fits naturally into the space without needing adjustments later.

me: That sounds great — exciting stage. Once you’ve had a chance to go through the new site, feel free to share any rough layout, dimensions, or even just a quick sketch if helpful. I can help you fine-tune the equipment placement early on, so everything fits naturally into the space without needing adjustments later.
customer: Ok sounds great

core_messages.message:
Hey there we are still mapping out the internal schedule and will circle back.
嘿，我们还在制定内部日程，稍后会再联系你。

Sounds good — that makes sense.

Whenever your timeline becomes clearer, just let me know and I’ll align production accordingly.

In the meantime, everything on our side remains ready.
Ok awesome

Hi ——,

Just wanted to reconnect briefly.

Since we’re already aligned on pricing and delivery, I just want to make sure we time production correctly once your internal schedule is finalized.

Even a rough target month helps me plan ahead on my side.

No rush at all — just keeping things aligned.

Hi —,

I was reviewing a few recent studio setups we helped with, and it reminded me of your project in Charlotte.

Many studios with a similar setup usually start with a configuration close to what you selected (Reformers + Tower + Cadillac), and the 10-unit mix you outlined is actually a very balanced starting layout.

If it’s helpful while you’re mapping out the schedule, I can also share a quick reference of how other studios arrange their equipment and space.

No rush at all — just thought it might be useful while things are coming together on your side
嗨——，

我最近在回顾几个我们协助过的近期工作室设置，这让我想起了你在夏洛特的项目。

许多具有类似设置的工作室通常从与你选择的配置（Reformers + Tower + Cadillac）相近的方案开始，而你概述的 10 单元混合配置实际上是一个非常均衡的起始布局。

如果你在规划日程时需要帮助，我还可以分享一份其他工作室如何安排设备和空间的快速参考。

完全不用着急——只是觉得在你们这边事情逐渐成形的时候可能会有些用处

Ok awesome thank you
好的太棒了谢谢
Boutique studio layout

Hi —

As promised, I put together a few simple layout examples based on your equipment mix (4 Reformers, 4 Reformer with Tower, and 2 Cadillacs).

These are typical ways many boutique Pilates studios organize a 10-piece setup to keep the flow smooth between group classes and private sessions.

Usually the Reformers are placed in the main training area, while the Cadillacs are positioned slightly toward the back or a quieter zone for private training or rehab work.

Group class layout
 群组课程布局

Private training layout
 私人培训布局
If you already have an approximate studio size or floor plan, I’d be happy to suggest a layout that fits your space even better.

Ok got it
好的，明白了

Hi,

Great.

Out of curiosity, do you already know roughly how big the studio space will be?

Even an approximate size (sq ft or sqm) would help make sure the layout and spacing work comfortably for the 10-piece setup.
你好，

很好。

出于好奇，你知道工作室空间大概有多大吗？

即使是一个大致的尺寸（平方英尺或平方米）也能帮助确保布局和间距适合 10 件设备的设置。
It will be under 1,500 square feet

Great — that size should work very well for the setup you mentioned.

For a studio under 1,500 sq ft, the combination of 4 reformers, 4 towers and 2 cadillacs is actually a very balanced setup. It allows enough space for comfortable movement while still keeping the room feeling open.

Many boutique Pilates studios in the US run a similar layout.
太好了——这个尺寸应该非常适合你提到的布局。

对于面积小于 1,500 平方英尺的工作室，4 台改革器、4 座塔和 2 辆凯迪拉克的组合实际上是一个非常均衡的布局。它提供了足够的空间进行舒适的活动，同时仍然保持房间的开放感。

美国许多精品普拉提工作室都采用类似的布局。

Since you already have a general idea of the studio size, I was wondering whether the timeline on your side is becoming any clearer — especially for when the space might be ready for equipment.

Even a rough target timing is helpful, so I can make sure production and shipping stay aligned once you’re ready.

No rush at all — just keeping everything coordinated for your project.
既然您已经对工作室的规模有了一个大致的了解，我想知道您那边的时间表是否变得更加清晰——特别是空间何时可以准备好安装设备。

即使是一个粗略的目标时间也很 helpful，这样我就能确保一旦您准备就绪，生产和运输能够保持一致。

完全没有紧迫感——只是确保一切协调一致，以便您的项目顺利进行。

seller_only_text:
We offer wooden, aluminum, foldable Reformers, as well as Reformer with Tower options.

The right model depends on your usage, quantity, and market. You can share these details with us, and we’ll guide you accordingly.
我们提供木质、铝制、可折叠的 Reformer，以及带塔式选项的 Reformer。

合适的型号取决于您的使用情况、数量和市场。您可以与我们分享这些详细信息，我们将相应地为您提供指导。
Hi, thanks for sharing the equipment list — I’ve reviewed it together with your studio plan.

Based on what you outlined, this setup is very well suited for a boutique studio with group Reformer classes as the core offering, supported by private sessions.
嗨，感谢您分享设备清单——我已经结合您的工作室计划一起审阅了。

根据你概述的内容，这个配置非常适合精品工作室，以团体 Reformer 课程为核心，辅以私人课程。
To move forward in the most efficient way, I’d just like to confirm two quick things:
 1. For the Reformers, do you have a material preference — wooden or aluminum?
 2. Would you prefer that I recommend a few suitable models for your setup, or would you like me to share the full catalog for you to review first?
为了以最高效的方式继续进行，我想确认两件小事：
1. 对于改革者，你们在材料上有偏好吗——木制还是铝制？
2. 您希望我为您推荐几个适合您配置的型号，还是希望我先分享完整目录供您先查看？
Once I have this, I can take it from there and keep things clear and simple for you.
Perfect, thank you for confirming.

I’ll share our full wooden Reformer catalog with you now, including the different wooden models commonly used for group-based boutique studios.

You can review them at your own pace, and once any models stand out, we can go through the details together and narrow things down.
Hi, good question.

For our wooden Reformers, the typical price range is approximately USD 300-1300 per unit, depending on the specific model and configuration.

Once you let me know which models from the catalog stand out to you, I can share the exact pricing for those and help you narrow things down.
Perfect, thank you for confirming.

Just to make sure I have this right, you’re selecting:
 • OR001 (Oak Reformer)
 • PR001 (Oak Reformer with Tower)
 • PC001 (Oak Cadillac)

Before I prepare the detailed pricing, could you please confirm the quantity for each model?
Once I have that, I’ll put the numbers together for you.
太好了，谢谢确认。

为了确保我理解正确，您选择的是：
• OR001（橡木改造器）
• PR001（带塔的橡木改造器）
• PC001 (橡木凯迪拉克)

在准备详细价格之前，您能确认每个型号的数量吗？
一旦我有了这些信息，我就会为您汇总数字。
Perfect, thank you — I’ve got it.

So the configuration is:
 • 4 × OR001 (Oak Reformer)
 • 4 × PR001 (Oak Reformer with Tower)
 • 2 × PC001 (Oak Cadillac)

I’ll prepare the detailed pricing based on this setup.
Before I finalize it, could you please confirm the delivery city and ZIP code, so I can make sure everything is calculated accurately?

Once I have that, I’ll send everything over.
Perfect, thank you — I have everything I need now.

I’m preparing the detailed pricing for this setup, including delivery to Charlotte, NC 28202.
I’ll send the full breakdown over shortly.
太好了，谢谢——我现在需要的东西都有了。

我正在准备这套设备的详细报价，包括运送到北卡罗来纳州夏洛特，邮编 28202。
我很快会发送完整的分解清单。
Hi ——,

Thanks for confirming the delivery details.
Based on your final configuration and using our 10+ units pricing tier, here is the full cost breakdown:

Equipment pricing (USD):

根据您的最终配置，并使用我们 10+单位的定价层级，以下是完整成本明细：

设备价格（美元）：
4 × OR001 (Oak Reformer) — $379 / unit → $1,516
4 × OR001 (橡木改革者) — 每台 379 美元 → 总计 1,516 美元
4 × PR001 (Oak Reformer with Tower) — $524 / unit → $2,096
2 × PC001 (Oak Cadillac) — $433 / unit → $866

Total equipment value: $4,478

Shipping & delivery (DDP): $2,533
This is a DDP shipment, including ocean freight, customs clearance, import duties/taxes, and final truck delivery to your address in Charlotte, NC 28202.

Estimated transit time:
Approximately 38–42 calendar days after vessel departure.

设备总价值：4,478 美元

运输与交付（DDP）：$2,533

这是一个 DDP 运输，包括海运费、清关费、进口关税/税费，以及最终卡车送货到您在北卡罗来纳州夏洛特，邮编 28202 的地址。

预计运输时间：

船离港后大约 38-42 个日历日。
Once you’re ready, I can prepare the formal PI and confirm the production schedule.
Sounds good — thank you.

Take your time, and feel free to come back with any questions or adjustments.
I’ll be here and happy to support whenever you’re ready.
Hi ——, just checking in to see if any questions came up on your side.
Happy to adjust or clarify anything if helpful.
Hi,

Just wanted to reconnect.

Based on similar studio projects, once pricing and logistics are aligned like this, the next step usually comes down to timing.

Are you targeting a specific opening window, or still mapping out the internal schedule?

That will help me reserve the right production slot for you.

Whenever your timeline becomes clearer, just let me know and I’ll align production accordingly.

events.message:
Hi,

Great.

Out of curiosity, do you already know roughly how big the studio space will be?

Even an approximate size (sq ft or sqm) would help make sure the layout and spacing work comfortably for the 10-piece setup.
你好，

很好。

出于好奇，你知道工作室空间大概有多大吗？

即使是一个大致的尺寸（平方英尺或平方米）也能帮助确保布局和间距适合 10 件设备的设置。
It will be under 1,500 square feet

Great — that size should work very well for the setup you mentioned.

For a studio under 1,500 sq ft, the combination of 4 reformers, 4 towers and 2 cadillacs is actually a very balanced setup. It allows enough space for comfortable movement while still keeping the room feeling open.

Many boutique Pilates studios in the US run a similar layout.
太好了——这个尺寸应该非常适合你提到的布局。

对于面积小于 1,500 平方英尺的工作室，4 台改革器、4 座塔和 2 辆凯迪拉克的组合实际上是一个非常均衡的布局。它提供了足够的空间进行舒适的活动，同时仍然保持房间的开放感。

美国许多精品普拉提工作室都采用类似的布局。

Since you already have a general idea of the studio size, I was wondering whether the timeline on your side is becoming any clearer — especially for when the space might be ready for equipment.

Even a rough target timing is helpful, so I can make sure production and shipping stay aligned once you’re ready.

No rush at all — just keeping everything coordinated for your project.
既然您已经对工作室的规模有了一个大致的了解，我想知道您那边的时间表是否变得更加清晰——特别是空间何时可以准备好安装设备。

即使是一个粗略的目标时间也很 helpful，这样我就能确保一旦您准备就绪，生产和运输能够保持一致。

完全没有紧迫感——只是确保一切协调一致，以便您的项目顺利进行。

Hi —,

I just wanted to check in briefly.
We will start with the new site this week and we will update you guys on what we need for that space

That sounds great — exciting stage. Once you’ve had a chance to go through the new site, feel free to share any rough layout, dimensions, or even just a quick sketch if helpful. I can help you fine-tune the equipment placement early on, so everything fits naturally into the space without needing adjustments later.
